palette_hint: Deep navy background for sidebar (#0f172a), off-white main area (#f8f9fb), near-black body text (#1a1a2e), teal accent (#0d9488) for links and highlights, amber (#f59e0b) for warnings
type_style: System sans-serif (ui-sans-serif, sans-serif) for headings and body at weights 400/600/700; monospace (ui-monospace, Consolas) for all code; compact line-height for density
description: API documentation site for a fictional real-time sensor data platform called FerroFlux, covering REST endpoints, SDKs, and integration guides.
constraints: Fixed left sidebar exactly 260px wide with navy background, white nav links grouped under collapsible section labels, full viewport height
Main content area has a max-width of 860px centered in the remaining space with 48px horizontal padding
Sticky right-side TOC exactly 200px wide on pages with long content, listing anchor links to h2/h3 headings in small gray text
Code blocks use dark background (#1e293b), teal-colored syntax highlights on keywords, monospace font, and a small gray language label in the top-right corner
Top bar (48px tall, white, border-bottom 1px #e2e8f0) spans full width above sidebar and main, containing product logo left, version badge center, and 'API Status' + 'GitHub' text links right

page_specs.overview: Three-column layout: left sidebar nav, main content with a product intro paragraph followed by a 3-column feature card grid (cards have teal left-border, icon emoji, title, and 2-line description), right TOC. Includes an architecture diagram placeholder as a bordered box with centered caption text.
page_specs.quickstart: Left sidebar + main content only (no right TOC). Main shows a 5-step numbered setup guide — each step has a bold heading, 1-2 sentences of prose, and a dark code block showing shell or JSON commands. A yellow amber callout box warns about API key security after step 2.
page_specs.endpoints: Three-column layout with sticky right TOC. Main content has four endpoint sections (GET /streams, POST /streams, GET /streams/{id}/data, DELETE /streams/{id}), each with an HTTP method badge (colored pill: green GET, blue POST, red DELETE), route, parameter table (3 columns: name, type, description), and a request/response code block pair.
page_specs.sdk-reference: Three-column layout. Left sidebar + main + right TOC. Main is split into two horizontal sub-sections side by side (Python SDK left, Node.js SDK right) each with a mini heading, install command code block, and a usage snippet code block. Below the split, a full-width compatibility table lists SDK versions against platform support using checkmark and cross symbols.
page_specs.changelog: Left sidebar + main (no right TOC). Main lists six version entries (v2.4, v2.3, v2.2, v2.1, v2.0, v1.9) each in its own card-like section with a version number as h2, release date in small muted text, and three categorized bullet lists labeled Added, Changed, and Fixed using colored badge prefixes (teal, gray, amber respectively).
